refs.description: The Linux kernel's canonical intrusive circular doubly linked list: list_head, list_add, list_del, and the list_for_each iteration macros used throughout the kernel.
Redis's generic doubly linked list (adlist) used internally for client lists, the slow-log, pub/sub clients, and other ordered collections.
Linux memory reclaim walks per-zone LRU page lists as doubly linked lists, splicing pages between active and inactive lists in O(1).
